name: case-study
description: Produce a compelling customer case study following the Problem / Solution / Results framework, suitable for B2B sales collateral or website publication.
input_description: Customer name or role, industry, the challenge they faced, the solution applied, and measurable results achieved.
output_description: Structured case study with executive summary, background, challenge, solution details, quantified results, and a pull-quote testimonial — formatted in Markdown.
